post.description: Invoke an agent with user input to retrieve a final response. If agent_id is not provided, the default agent will be used. Use thread_id to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation. run_id kwarg is also attached to messages for recording feedback. Use user_id to persist and continue a conversation across multiple threads.

Invoke an agent with user input to retrieve a final response. If agent_id is not provided, the default agent will be used. Use thread_id to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation. run_id kwarg is also attached to messages for recording feedback. Use user_id to persist and continue a conversation across multiple threads.

Stream an agent's response to a user input, including intermediate messages and tokens. If agent_id is not provided, the default agent will be used. Use thread_id to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation. run_id kwarg is also attached to all messages for recording feedback. Use user_id to persist and continue a conversation across multiple threads. Set `stream_tokens=false` to return intermediate messages but not token-by-token.

Stream an agent's response to a user input, including intermediate messages and tokens. If agent_id is not provided, the default agent will be used. Use thread_id to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation. run_id kwarg is also attached to all messages for recording feedback. Use user_id to persist and continue a conversation across multiple threads. Set `stream_tokens=false` to return intermediate messages but not token-by-token.

Record feedback for a run to LangSmith. This is a simple wrapper for the LangSmith create_feedback API, so the credentials can be stored and managed in the service rather than the client. See: https://api.smith.langchain.com/redoc#tag/feedback/operation/create_feedback_api_v1_feedback_post

get.description: Get chat history for a thread (GET). Prefer this for read-only loading. Returns messages with optional next_cursor and prev_cursor for pagination.

post.description: Get chat history for a thread (POST). Same as GET; body instead of query. Returns messages with optional next_cursor and prev_cursor for pagination.

delete.description: Delete all chat history for a specific (user_id, thread_id) pair. Permanently removes all checkpoint data for the conversation from the underlying store (MongoDB / Postgres / SQLite) and clears the in-memory cache entry. Returns 204 No Content on success.

parameters.name: user_id

schema.description: User ID that owns the conversation.
schema.title: User Id

parameters.description: User ID that owns the conversation.

parameters.name: thread_id

schema.description: Thread ID of the conversation to delete.
schema.title: Thread Id

parameters.description: Thread ID of the conversation to delete.

post.description: List conversation threads for a user. Requires user_id. Returns thread IDs (and optional metadata) scoped to that user. Supports limit, offset, and optional search filter.

examples: A research assistant for generating research papers.

content.title: Content
